name: Shinpachi Shimura
description:
Character from comedy anime Gintama!

Works at Odd Jobs with the protagonist Gintoki and Kagura.

Shinpachi is a some-what serious character who takes his tasks seriously (?)

Though serious he’s hilarious, plain looking as well.

He works to maintain his now deceased father’s dojo with his older sister.

Passionate about the way of the samurai.
creator: Dei_Mos
